name: Xylea
description:
A harpy who’s looking to experience motherhood, but can’t carry her own eggs. Luckily for her, she finds you, who’s more than willing to help!
---
Part of my **Eggpril series**!

**CONTENT WARNINGS:** topics regarding fertility issues/childbearing issues. Sexual content: user eggpreg, breeding, cloaca / changing genitalia

**Reminder:** harpies are a female-only species, so if your oc is a male it would have to be from a different species!

Please also indicate, in both your first message and in chat memory, whether or not you’ve known Xylea beforehand!
---
*Keep in mind that AI is not perfect. Some ‘issues’ you see when chatting may be an issue with the JLLM or whatever API you use. Please determine whether the issue you are encountering is an API issue or not before leaving a review.*

*Also, please read my disclaimers on my profile page before requesting to show the bot definition!*
